case_title: CARUSO, PAUL vs. CASTRO, CHRISTY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARUSO, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, CHRISTY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, CHRISTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 FELL ST, #1, SF, CA $3,700.00 RENT, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,185.00, LEASE FORFEITED, THE JUDGMT WILL BE STYD PENDING COMPLETION OF THE TERMS OF STIPULATION PURSUANT TO THE STIP OF THE PARTIES.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, CHRISTY

JUDGE CHAITIN, KCUELLAR-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; LEWIS PHON ATTY FOR PLTF; DEFT CHRISTY CASTRO IN PRO PER; CASE SETTLES; TERM OF STIP READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMT FOR POSSESS & REST FOR THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 516 FELL #1, SF; BACK RENTS IN THE AMT OF $3700. FROM 6/1/99 TO 12/1/99; $135. COURT COSTS; $1350. ATTY FEES TO PAID IN THE AMT OF $200 PER MO BEGINNING 2/1/00; $2000. OF $3700. TO BE PAID BY 5PM ON 12/6 AND BAL TO BE PAID BY 12/13/99 5PM, IN THE FORM OF CASHIERS CHECK TO BE PAID AT MR LEWIS PHON OFFICE ATTY FOR PLTF; IF DEFT COMPLIES THE STIP JUDGMT IS STYD AND DISM TO BE FILED; IF NON COMPLIANCE PLTF ENTITLED TO JUDGMT AND POSSESSION W/ OUT FURTHER NOTICE AND WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED; NO FURTHER STYS
